trigger: 提亲场景（scene_001）、闺房对话（scene_002）和门前谈判（  scene_003）中，作为未婚高家小姐出现

appearance_delta.face: 更显青春活力，眼神锐利中透出少女倔强
appearance_delta.body: 苗条修长，未经生育的挺拔体态
appearance_delta.hair: 少女发式，如垂发或简单环髻

visual_reference: stunning young Chinese noblewoman in ancient Tang-Song dynasty maiden Hanfu, sharp intelligent phoenix eyes, elegant oval face, long flowing black hair in youthful maiden hairstyle with delicate jade hairpins, fair skin, strong-willed and proud expression with slightly lifted chin, highly detailed cinematic lighting, 8k
